case_title: GERDA KIRCHER VS. BRIAN STEWART O'SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA SERVED MAY-14-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT O'SULLIVAN, BRIAN STEWART

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'SULLIVAN, BRIAN STEWART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1105 POST ST. #206, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
